name: Civo
description: Monitor Civo Kubernetes cloud infrastructure for cluster inventory and team access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Civo Dashboard at https://dashboard.civo.com
2. Go to Settings → Profile → Security
3. Generate an API key
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Civo Dashboard → Settings → Profile → Security

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists Civo Kubernetes clusters for infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Civo organization teams and member access
